title: Optimize sync CLI hotspot tests
summary: Replace redundant expensive sync CLI smoke tests with lightweight forwarding coverage while preserving representative end-to-end sync assertions.
scope_items: Collapse expensive CLI sync wrapper tests that only assert JSON envelopes or output wiring.
Keep one real end-to-end assertion per heavy sync family and rely on lower-level sync tests for runtime behavior.
done_when_items: The slow CLI sync hotspot files are materially faster without losing meaningful behavioral coverage.
The retained CLI tests still prove parser dispatch and output-shape behavior.
